product.name: 메디힐 PDRN 리프팅 세럼
product.fullName: 메디힐 PDRN 모공 탄력 세럼 40+40ml 단독 기획

sections.name: 히어로 배너
sections.prompt:
Korean skincare HERO BANNER for 메디힐 PDRN 모공 탄력 세럼 40+40ml 단독 기획.

CRITICAL — TITLE TREATMENT OVERLAY:
The first reference image is a transparent PNG title treatment. You MUST incorporate this typography layout into the hero. Overlay or recreate these EXACT texts in the same style:
- "MEDIHEAL" — white uppercase geometric sans-serif, wide tracking
- "PDRN" — large gradient purple chrome metallic bevel letters
- "리프팅 세럼" — Korean rounded gothic below PDRN
- "피부를 당기듯 밀착!" — lavender subtitle
- "40+40ml 단독 기획" — white promo with "39% OFF" in coral-red

The purple PDRN dropper bottle (third reference image) positioned center-right. Do NOT alter the product appearance.
Background: lavender-to-white gradient, subtle DNA helix at 5% opacity.
"39%" circular coral-red badge floating.
Match the title treatment's typography style, colors, and layout as closely as possible. Fix any broken Korean characters.
STYLE: Purple #7B5EA7/#9B7FCA, dark #2D1B4E, light #F3EEFF, red #FF4757. Clinical-luxe Korean dermacosmetic. STATIC IMAGE only — NO buttons, NO UI elements. Mobile 3:4 vertical.

sections.name: 제품 소개
sections.prompt:
Korean skincare PRODUCT OVERVIEW. 메디힐 PDRN 모공 탄력 세럼 40+40ml 단독 기획. EXACT purple PDRN dropper bottle centered on lavender gradient. Keep product as-is. Floating callouts: "PDRN 8,902 ppm", "Squalane 10,000 ppm", "40ml × 2". Clinical product photography.
STYLE: Purple #7B5EA7/#9B7FCA, dark #2D1B4E, light #F3EEFF, red #FF4757. Clinical-luxe Korean dermacosmetic. STATIC IMAGE only — NO buttons, NO UI elements. Mobile 3:4 vertical.

sections.name: 핵심 효능
sections.prompt:
Korean skincare KEY BENEFITS infographic. "PDRN의 4가지 핵심 효능" title. 2×2 grid: "모공 케어" hexagon icon/"넓어진 모공을 촘촘하게", "탄력 개선" curve icon/"처진 피부에 탄력 부여", "피부 재생" circular icon/"PDRN이 피부 재생 촉진", "깊은 보습" water drop/"스쿠알란 깊은 보습층". Purple icons, white bg.
STYLE: Purple #7B5EA7/#9B7FCA, dark #2D1B4E, light #F3EEFF, red #FF4757. Clinical-luxe Korean dermacosmetic. STATIC IMAGE only — NO buttons, NO UI elements. Mobile 3:4 vertical.

sections.name: 성분 하이라이트
sections.prompt:
Korean skincare KEY INGREDIENT. Large "PDRN 8,902 ppm" bold gradient purple centered. DNA helix behind at 15%. "폴리데옥시리보뉴클레오티드" below. Cards: "연어 유래 PDRN", "피부 재생 촉진", "임상 시험 완료". Molecular bg texture.
STYLE: Purple #7B5EA7/#9B7FCA, dark #2D1B4E, light #F3EEFF, red #FF4757. Clinical-luxe Korean dermacosmetic. STATIC IMAGE only — NO buttons, NO UI elements. Mobile 3:4 vertical.

sections.name: 텍스처
sections.prompt:
Korean skincare TEXTURE. Split: Left — serum texture close-up, translucent purple-clear. Right — "실리프팅 텍스처" title, "가볍게 밀착되는 워터 세럼", "끈적임 없이 빠르게 흡수". Product bottle small corner, matching ref. Editorial skincare photography. Lavender bg.
STYLE: Purple #7B5EA7/#9B7FCA, dark #2D1B4E, light #F3EEFF, red #FF4757. Clinical-luxe Korean dermacosmetic. STATIC IMAGE only — NO buttons, NO UI elements. Mobile 3:4 vertical.

sections.name: 사용 전후
sections.prompt:
Korean skincare BEFORE/AFTER. Left "BEFORE": stylized skin — visible pores, dull. Right "AFTER 4주": smooth, glowing, tight. Purple divider. Stats: "모공 -32%" "탄력 +28%" "보습 +45%" purple pills. "*개인차" gray. "4주간의 변화" title. Illustrated, not photos.
STYLE: Purple #7B5EA7/#9B7FCA, dark #2D1B4E, light #F3EEFF, red #FF4757. Clinical-luxe Korean dermacosmetic. STATIC IMAGE only — NO buttons, NO UI elements. Mobile 3:4 vertical.

sections.name: 리뷰
sections.prompt:
Korean skincare REVIEWS. "4.8" + 5 gold stars + "(2,847 리뷰)". "92% 재구매율" purple heart. 3 review cards lavender bg: ★★★★★ "모공이 확실히 줄어들었어요!" 복합성 / ★★★★★ "PDRN 세럼 중 가성비 최고" 건성 / ★★★★☆ "탄력감이 올라온 느낌" 지성.
STYLE: Purple #7B5EA7/#9B7FCA, dark #2D1B4E, light #F3EEFF, red #FF4757. Clinical-luxe Korean dermacosmetic. STATIC IMAGE only — NO buttons, NO UI elements. Mobile 3:4 vertical.

sections.name: 기획 혜택
sections.prompt:
Korean skincare BUNDLE. Two EXACT purple PDRN bottles + "+" between. Match ref. "1+1" 3D purple. "40ml + 40ml = 80ml". "49,000원" strikethrough → "29,900원" bold purple → "1ml당 374원" gray. "올리브영 단독" purple badge. "한정 수량" coral-red. Lavender bg.
STYLE: Purple #7B5EA7/#9B7FCA, dark #2D1B4E, light #F3EEFF, red #FF4757. Clinical-luxe Korean dermacosmetic. STATIC IMAGE only — NO buttons, NO UI elements. Mobile 3:4 vertical.

sections.name: 사용 방법
sections.prompt:
Korean skincare HOW TO USE. 3 steps vertical: 01 "세안 후 토너로 정돈" toner illust / 02 "세럼 2-3 펌프 도포" dropper bottle ref / 03 "두드려 흡수 후 크림 마무리" patting face. Purple numbered circles. "이렇게 사용하세요" title.
STYLE: Purple #7B5EA7/#9B7FCA, dark #2D1B4E, light #F3EEFF, red #FF4757. Clinical-luxe Korean dermacosmetic. STATIC IMAGE only — NO buttons, NO UI elements. Mobile 3:4 vertical.

sections.name: 임상 데이터
sections.prompt:
Korean skincare CLINICAL DATA. "임상으로 입증된 PDRN" title. 4-week bar chart purple gradient. Circles: 87% "탄력 개선" / 92% "재구매 의향" / 85% "모공 축소". "*자체 임상" gray. Data-driven clinical.
STYLE: Purple #7B5EA7/#9B7FCA, dark #2D1B4E, light #F3EEFF, red #FF4757. Clinical-luxe Korean dermacosmetic. STATIC IMAGE only — NO buttons, NO UI elements. Mobile 3:4 vertical.

sections.name: 루틴 가이드
sections.prompt:
Korean skincare ROUTINE. Flow: "클렌저 → 토너 → [PDRN 세럼] → 크림 → 선크림". PDRN step highlighted purple glow. Icons above each. "당신의 루틴에 추가하세요". "토너 다음, 크림 전". Clean diagram.
STYLE: Purple #7B5EA7/#9B7FCA, dark #2D1B4E, light #F3EEFF, red #FF4757. Clinical-luxe Korean dermacosmetic. STATIC IMAGE only — NO buttons, NO UI elements. Mobile 3:4 vertical.

sections.prompt:
Korean skincare BRAND TRUST. "MEDIHEAL" silver/gray elegant. "대한민국 마스크팩 1위". Badges: "피부과 테스트" medical / "비건 인증" leaf / "올리브영 베스트" trophy. Purple pills. "피부 과학 기반 더마코스메틱" text.

Korean skincare INGREDIENTS. "전 성분 분석" title. Cards: "PDRN 8,902ppm" star purple / "스쿠알란 10,000ppm" / "나이아신아마이드" / "히알루론산". Each: name + concentration + benefit. "*EWG 그린" note.

sections.prompt:
Korean skincare COMPARISON. "PDRN 세럼 비교". 3 columns: "일반" vs "PDRN" vs "메디힐 PDRN" (purple bg). PDRN함량/보습지속/텍스처/가격. ✓ purple winners.

Korean skincare AWARDS. "인증과 수상". Badges: "올리브영 어워즈" trophy / "글로우픽 1위" medal / "화해 9.0점" star / "더마 인증" seal. Purple+gold. Institutional.

Korean skincare FAQ. "자주 묻는 질문". Cards: "민감피부?" "피부과 테스트 저자극" / "아침저녁?" "네 모두 가능" / "다른 세럼과?" "PDRN 먼저" / "유통기한?" "개봉 후 12개월" / "임산부?" "전문의 상담". Q purple, A gray.

sections.prompt:
